props.text: Select a device on the left to drive its handshake.

customMethods.name: selectDevice
customMethods.script:
self.view.custom.selectedDevice = deviceCode
	dt = BlueRidge.Sim.getDeviceType(deviceCode)
	self.view.custom.selectedDeviceType = dt
	self.view.custom.pendingScenarios = BlueRidge.Sim.getScenariosForDeviceType(dt)
	self.view.custom.failedScenarios = []
	self.view.custom.failedText = ""

customMethods.name: copyFailed
customMethods.script:
failed = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.failedScenarios) or []
	lines = ["FAILED: " + str(f.get("title", "")) for f in failed]
	self.view.custom.failedText = "\n".join(lines)
